Key:        LU-19238
Summary:    tunefs.lustre: exiting with 7 (Argument list too long)
Link:       https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-19238
Type:       Bug
Priority:   Medium
Status:     Open
Resolution: Unresolved
Assignee:   Jian Yu
Reporter:   Jian Yu
Created:    Wed, 6 Aug 2025 04:52:19 +0000
Updated:    Thu, 14 Aug 2025 22:02:25 +0000
Links:      Related: is related to  LU-19231

--- Description ---
# tunefs.lustre --erase-params /dev/vda5

Read previous values:

Target: exafs-MDT0004

Index: 4

Lustre FS: exafs

Mount type: ldiskfs

Flags: 0x1061

(MDT first_time update no_primnode )

Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro

Parameters: failover.node=127.0.0.2@tcp mgsnode=127.0.0.2@tcp

+failover.node==192.10.0.66@o2ib10,192.10.1.66@o2ib10,192.11.0.66@o2ib11,192.11.1.66@o2ib11,192.12.0.66@o2ib12,192.12.1.66@o2ib12,192.13.0.66@o2ib13,192.13.1.66@o2ib13,192.14.0.66@o2ib14,192.14.1.66@o2ib14,192.15.0.66@o2ib15,192.15.1.66@o2ib15,192.16.0.66@o2ib16,192.16.1.66@o2ib16,192.17.0.66@o2ib17,192.17.1.66@o2ib17,192.18.0.66@o2ib18,192.18.1.66@o2ib18,192.19.0.66@o2ib19,192.19.1.66@o2ib19,192.20.0.66@o2ib20,192.20.1.66@o2ib20,192.21.0.66@o2ib21,192.21.1.66@o2ib21,192.22.0.66@o2ib22,192.22.1.66@o2ib22,192.23.0.66@o2ib23,192.23.1.66@o2ib23,192.24.0.66@o2ib24,192.24.1.66@o2ib24,192.25.0.66@o2ib25,192.25.1.66@o2ib25,192.26.0.66@o2ib26,192.26.1.66@o2ib26,192.27.0.66@o2ib27,192.27.1.66@o2ib27,192.28.0.66@o2ib28,192.28.1.66@o2ib28,192.29.0.66@o2ib29,192.29.1.66@o2ib29,192.30.0.66@o2ib30,192.30.1.66@o2ib30,192.31.0.66@o2ib31,192.31.1.66@o2ib31,192.32.0.66@o2ib32,192.32.1.66@o2ib32,192.33.0.66@o2ib33,192.33.1.66@o2ib33,192.34.0.66@o2ib34,192.34.1.66@o2ib34,192.35.0.66@o2ib35,192.35.1.66@o2ib35,192.36.0.66@o2ib36,192.36.1.66@o2ib36,192.37.0.66@o2ib37,192.37.1.66@o2ib37,192.38.0.66@o2ib38,192.38.1.66@o2ib38,192.39.0.66@o2ib39,192.39.1.66@o2ib39,192.40.0.66@o2ib40,192.40.1.66@o2ib40,192.41.0.66@o2ib41,192.41.1.66@o2ib41

tunefs.lustre: exiting with 7 (Argument list too long)

--- Comment (gerrit, Thu, 14 Aug 2025 22:02:25 +0000) ---
"Oleg Drokin " uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60747

Subject: LU-19238 tests: Ensure dir updates are visible

Project: fs/lustre-release

Branch: master

Current Patch Set: 1

Commit: e31d2a7d85300a419bd59f4cec22e52724609eb5

--- Comment (yujian, Wed, 6 Aug 2025 18:43:15 +0000) ---
I just found increasing the value of LDD_PARAM_LEN could make tunefs.lustre pass with long params, however, mount.lustre would fail as follows:

error: add mount options param=...... too long, 6376 over limit 4096

The error was from append_option() in lustre/utils/mount_lustre.c:

append_option()

out_err:
        /* this 'too long' message is checked in conf-sanity test_98 */
        fprintf(stderr,
                "error: add mount options %s%s too long, %zu over limit %zu\n",
                param, value, strlen(options) + strlen(param) + strlen(value),
                options_len);
        return E2BIG;

And the options_len was defined as maxopt_len in main() as follows:

        size_t maxopt_len;
        size_t g_pagesize;

        // ......
        g_pagesize = sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE);
        // ......
        maxopt_len = MIN(g_pagesize, 64 * 1024);

So, the limitation is  4096.

--- Comment (simmonsja, Wed, 6 Aug 2025 14:23:17 +0000) ---
Doesn't this change break compatibility? I need to look at the libmount API for handling this.

--- Comment (gerrit, Wed, 6 Aug 2025 05:02:55 +0000) ---
"Jian Yu " uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60546

Subject: LU-19238 utils: increase LDD_PARAM_LEN

Project: fs/lustre-release

Branch: master

Current Patch Set: 1

Commit: fc7fa26a9105d3b0ba84c1528a07e323c647eda9
